The Studio

A quiet room, a steady hand, and a design that was never meant for anyone else.

ELBO.INK is the work of a tattoo artist obsessed with line, weight and restraint. No flash off the wall — every piece starts as a conversation and ends as a drawing made only for you.

Working clean, working slow, and treating the skin like the last page it will ever be on. Booking is by appointment only, through Instagram.

  • Specialty Fine line / Blackwork
  • Style Custom only
  • Booking By appointment
  • Based in [LOCATION]
What I Do

Fine Line

Delicate single-needle work. Soft, precise, and built to age well.

Blackwork

Bold solid black, negative space and high contrast graphic pieces.

Custom Design

Original artwork drawn from scratch around your idea and your body.

Cover & Rework

Reimagining or refreshing existing tattoos into something you love.
